subcodes.first_line: We know what hardship and tribulation thou endurest, yet since it is in the path of the All-Merciful, it is pure joy [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ميدانيم که در چه زحمتی و چه مشقّت ولی چون در سبيل حضرت رحمانيّت است عين مسرتّست
subcodes.subjects: @tests and trials; sacrifice and suffering, @predictions and prophecies, @spiritual emotions and susceptibilities, @forgiveness; grace; bounty; mercy; compassion of God, @divine grace, bounty, confirmations; spiritual capacity
